items.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
items.summary: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

items.title: Guam and Northern Mariana Islands Prepare for Typhoon Bavi
items.summary: Typhoon Bavi, a tropical cyclone barreling through the Pacific Ocean, was forecast to pass near the U.S. territories on Monday with the force of a Category 5 hurricane.
